_comment: PER-PROJECT. /setup fills each command below, or sets "" to skip that gate. Single source of truth for the local hooks AND the CI workflow. Layout: Spring Boot (Maven) at repo root, React+Vite+TS PWA in frontend/. Each gate fans out to both; commands run via `sh -c`. The frontend cd runs in a subshell so the backend ./mvnw still runs from the repo root.
lint: (cd frontend && npm run lint) && ./mvnw -B spotless:check sonar:sonar
